results.text: Overgrown Shrine: Sacrifice gives +1 to Swift Tests today.
Vanir Relic: Cursed item humming with nature magic.
Gullveig's Altar: Gold and Trinkets. Taking them invokes her wrath.
Flooded Cave: Contains Trinkets. Test Swift DR12 to avoid being trapped.
Seed of Freyr: Planting creates a sanctuary (+d6 HP from rests).
